sections.paragraph: prep. i.q. עִם, only found with the suffix of the first pers. עִמָּדִי i.q. עִמִּי with me, Gen 21:23 31:5 by me, Gen 29:19, 27 Gen 29:27see other examples under עִם . This word is not at all connected with the root עָמַד to stand, but it rather belongs to an unused root עמד = ענד to tie, to bind together, answering to the Arabic عِنْدَ. Compare עָמַם.
